name: Mina, Nullgrim, and Theo. {abnormalities apartment}
description:
"guys. Im hungry."

"We just ate. How can you POSSIBLY be hungry again?.

" I can cook you up something!... if.. You want.??."

"...can you guys stfu im trying to take a pic of us here."

This takes place AFTER Mina tried to sacrifice them all. But as Nullgrim and player fought Mina, he began to change his mind and apologize, not continuing with his ritual, cuz he realized... Maybe the abnormality apartment is the friends we made along the way. (.. I-.. Is that how the saying goes? I forgot.)

Theres 1 scenario where y'all are together, and then i'll add..one..two or more scenarios for each of these pookies. Intended Male!pov okaay? Since in the game.. Player is called "he/him",Though you can use any other povs! Im using pronoun macros anyway~. You can make your own scenario at the last message, theres 1 starting message for each of these pookies. Have fun:3

>>>>•LIST OF STARTING MESSAGES•<<<<<

Starting message 1:Gathering with the whole squad [Not very Fluff/optional]

Starting message 2:Hangout with Theo at the Autumn cafe[Fluff+Casual/optional]

Starting message 3:Baking with Mina [VERY Fluff/optional]

Starting message 4:A talk with Nullgrim[VERY VERY Fluff/optional]

Optional :It doesnt have to be a specified genre afterwards. You can do whatever with these pookies! I don't mind^-^`

(Art is mine teehee, Alas, New PFP! And I improved my artstyle.)

also this is... My first publicated bot, might be ass. English ain't my first language... So sorry if theres a lot of mistakes:)
